account_id.description: The Knowledge Graph to use for the Merchant. Please note that the Knowledge Graph will be reset. When not provided, this method will use the first available Knowledge Graph.

deleted.description: True if the merchant has been deleted

ignore_brand.description: Whether to ignore the `brand` property during validation

ignore_image.description: Whether to ignore the `image` property during validation

publisher_name.description: The publisher name (shows in schema publisher)

url_strategy.description: Which strategy to use to write the url schema.

writer_service.description: How to write the merchant data to the graph, if unsure, do not set anything (by default `wordpressMerchantWriter`).
